query_title: Tim and Eric's Billion Dollar Movie

recommendations.title: Hello Mr. Billionaire
recommendations.overview: A pathetic minor league Soccer Goalkeeper was given a task - to spend 1 Billion in thirty days, if successful he will get 30 Billion. However, he's not allowed to tell anyone about the task and he must not own any valuables by end of it.

recommendations.title: At the Sports Bar
recommendations.overview: Lino lives in Turin with the family of his sister. He doesn't have a good job and never enough money. But in a day his life changes: he wins 1 billion dollars in a lottery and... everyone becomes a friend, the girl who he liked becomes his girlfriend

recommendations.title: Never Sleep Again: The Elm Street Legacy
recommendations.overview: For decades, Freddy Krueger has slashed his way through the dreams of countless youngsters, scaring up over half a billion dollars at the box office across eight terrifying, spectacular films.

recommendations.title: His Three Daughters
recommendations.overview: Emotions run high when three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to watch over their ailing father during his final days.

recommendations.title: Hotel Gagarin
recommendations.overview: An highly heterogeneous group of people go to Armenia to make a movie, all ignoring what will happen to each of them.

recommendations.title: 100 Bloody Acres
recommendations.overview: Reg and Lindsay run an organic fertiliser business. They need a fresh supply of their "secret ingredient" to process through the meat grinder. Reg comes across two guys and a girl with a broken-down vehicle on their way to a music festival.

recommendations.title: Date and Switch
recommendations.overview: Two guys who make a pact to lose their virginity before prom find their friendship tested when one of them comes out of the closet.

recommendations.title: Delhi Belly
recommendations.overview: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most-powerful crime syndicates.

recommendations.title: Rookies Run Amok
recommendations.overview: Les Bidasses en Folie, a french movie from 1971, is a very short, easy to watch, slapstick hippie comedy.

recommendations.title: Sudden Death
recommendations.overview: When a man's daughter is suddenly taken during a championship hockey game – with the captors demanding a billion dollars by game's end – he frantically sets a plan in motion to rescue her and abort an impending explosion before the final buzzer.
